rows.noticeTitle: 湖南分行全员阅读悦课项目招标公告
rows.userName: 中国工商银行股份有限公司湖南省分行

rows.noticeTitle: 盛银消费金融有限公司2026年IT私有云软件采购项目招标公告
rows.userName: 盛银消费金融有限公司
rows.noticeContent: <p class="MsoNormal" align="center" style="margin-top:12.0000pt;margin-bottom:6.0000pt;page-break-after:avoid;mso-pagination:lines-together;text-align:center;mso-outline-level:1;line-height:200%;"><b><span style="font-family: 宋体; line-height: 200%; font-size: 14pt;"><font face="宋体">盛银消费金融有限公司</font>2026年IT私有云软件采购项目招标公告</span></b><b><span style="font-family: 宋体; line-height: 200%; font-size: 14pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></b></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">盛银消费金融有限公司委托</span><u><span style="font-family: 宋体; font-size: 12pt;">中捷通信有限公司</span></u><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">就</span><u><span style="font-family: 宋体; font-size: 12pt;"><font face="宋体">盛银消费金融有限公司</font>2026年IT私有云软件采购项目</span></u><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">采用公开招标形式进行采购，本项目资金来源为自筹且已落实，已具备招标条件，特邀请有意向且具有提供标的物能力的潜在投标人（以下简称投标人）参加投标。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left:21.2500pt;text-indent:-21.2500pt;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="font-family: 宋体; font-size: 12pt;">1.</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><font face="宋体">招标编号：</font>SYXFJR_2026020（ZJZB-2026-17411）</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:12.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:1.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">项目名称：</span><u><span style="font-family: 宋体; font-size: 12pt;"><font face="宋体">盛银消费金融有限公司</font>2026年IT私有云软件采购项目</span></u><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left:21.2500pt;text-indent:-21.2500pt;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="font-family: 宋体; font-size: 12pt;">2.</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">项目内容、范围、规模：</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoBodyTextFirstIndent" style="margin-top:0.0000pt;margin-bottom:0.0000pt;mso-para-margin-top:0.0000gd;mso-para-margin-bottom:0.0000gd;text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">2.1采购内容：盛银消费金融有限公司2026年IT私有云软件采购</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoBodyTextFirstIndent" style="margin-top:0.0000pt;margin-bottom:0.0000pt;mso-para-margin-top:0.0000gd;mso-para-margin-bottom:0.0000gd;text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">2.2</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><font face="宋体">本项目不划分标包</font>/标段，选取</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">1名中标人，中标份额100%。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoBodyTextFirstIndent" style="margin-top:0.0000pt;margin-bottom:0.0000pt;mso-para-margin-top:0.0000gd;mso-para-margin-bottom:0.0000gd;text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">2.3</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">采购估算金额：</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">120.00万元。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoBodyTextFirstIndent" style="margin-top:0.0000pt;margin-bottom:0.0000pt;mso-para-margin-top:0.0000gd;mso-para-margin-bottom:0.0000gd;text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">2.4服务</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">期限：</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">3年。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoBodyTextFirstIndent" style="margin-top:0.0000pt;margin-bottom:0.0000pt;mso-para-margin-top:0.0000gd;mso-para-margin-bottom:0.0000gd;text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">2.5本项目设置最高总价投标限价，为120.00万元。投标人报价高于最高限价的，其投标将被否决。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="margin-left:21.2500pt;text-indent:-21.2500pt;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="font-family: 宋体; font-size: 12pt;">3.</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">投标人资格要求</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">3.1资格审查方式：本项目为资格后审，将在开标后对投标人进行资格审查，符合资格条件的投标人通过资格审查。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">3.2资格要求：</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">3.2.1投标人应为中华人民共和国境内（不含香港、澳门、台湾地区）法律上和财务上独立的法人或依法登记注册的组织，合法运作并独立于招标人和招标代理机构（需提供营业执照加盖公章）。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">3.2.2投标人的法定代表人或单位负责人为同一人或者存在控股、管理关系的不同单位，不得参加同一标段投标或者未划分标段的同一招标项目的投标（提供承诺函并加盖公章）。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">3.2.3投标人须就能够为本项目开具增值税专用发票提供相关证明材料或承诺函（国家相关法律法规规定不适用开具增值税专用发票的情形除外）。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">3.2.4本项目不接受联合体投标，不得分包转包（须提供承诺函并加盖公章）。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">3.2.5投标人拟为本项目提供的货物及服务均须符合国家、招标人规定的资格条件和相关要求，并保证其投标文件中的全部内容均为真实、有效的（须提供承诺函并加盖公章）。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">3.2.6投标人不得存在下列情形之一（需提供承诺函并加盖公章）：</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><font face="宋体">（</font>1）投标人被责令停业或破产状态的。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><font face="宋体">（</font>2）投标人被暂停或取消投标资格的。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><font face="宋体">（</font>3）投标人财产被重组、接管、查封、扣押或冻结的。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><font face="宋体">（</font>4）投标人在最近三年内有违法行为或被媒体曝光且在社会上造成恶劣影响的。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><font face="宋体">（</font>5）投标人在最近三年内严重违反合同约定的。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><font face="宋体">（</font>6）投标人在最近三年内有骗取中标的。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><font face="宋体">（</font>7）投标人（含此投标人母子公司、关联公司）在政府、银行及相关行业采购服务中有不良记录的，其服务在使用过程中出现过重大质量或安全问题且未妥善解决的。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><font face="宋体">（</font>8）与招标人的历史合同中存在不良记录或者存在服务重大瑕疵的导致生产问题的。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:'Times New Roman';mso-fareast-font-family:宋体;font-size:10.5000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">3.2.7投标人参加招标活动近三年（2023年6月至投标文件递交截止之日止），在经营活动中没有重大违法记录（须提供承诺函加盖公章，并提供下列查询截图）。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><font face="宋体">（</font>1）国家企业信用信息公示系统（http://www.gsxt.gov.cn/index.html）无“列入严重违法失信企业名单（黑名单）信息”记录；</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><font face="宋体">（</font>2）中国执行信息公开网（http://zxgk.court.gov.cn/shixin/）未被列入全国法院失信被执行人员名单；</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><font face="宋体">（</font>3）中国政府采购网(www.ccgp.gov.cn)未被列入政府采购严重违法失信行为记录名单。</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">3.2.8投标人未被列入盛京银行禁用供应商名单。（以盛京银行禁用供应商名单查询为准）</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;"><o:p></o:p></span></p><p class="MsoNormal" style="text-indent:24.0000pt;mso-char-indent-count:2.0000;line-height:20.0000pt;mso-line-height-rule:exactly;"><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">3.2.9投标人须提供所投产品的原厂授权</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">或原厂商声明函</span><span style="mso-spacerun:'yes';font-family:宋体;font-size:12.0000pt;mso-font-kerning:1.0000pt;">。</span><span
